title.en: Taking Out the Trash and Recycling

phrases.en: Pam notices that the kitchen trash can is full.
phrases.zh: 帕姆注意到厨房的垃圾桶满了。

phrases.en: She presses the trash down firmly with her hand.
phrases.zh: 她用手把垃圾用力按下去。

phrases.en: She lifts the heavy bag out of the bin.
phrases.zh: 她把沉甸甸的垃圾袋从桶里提出来。

phrases.en: She ties off the top of the bag tightly.
Next, she sorts the recyclables into separate piles.
phrases.zh: 接着，她把可回收物分成不同的几堆。

phrases.en: She rinses the empty bottles and cans quickly.
phrases.zh: 她迅速冲洗空瓶子和易拉罐。

phrases.en: She flattens the cardboard boxes to save space.
phrases.zh: 她把纸箱压扁以节省空间。

phrases.en: She drops the clean paper and plastic into the blue bin.
phrases.zh: 她把干净的纸张和塑料放进蓝色回收桶。

phrases.en: Then, she carries the trash bin out to the curb.
phrases.zh: 然后，她把垃圾桶搬到路边。

phrases.en: She wheels the recycling bin beside it neatly.
phrases.zh: 她把回收桶整齐地推到旁边。

phrases.en: She lines up both bins for the morning pickup.
phrases.zh: 她把两个桶摆好，等着早上来收。

phrases.en: Back inside, she puts a fresh liner in the empty can.
phrases.zh: 回到屋里，她给空桶套上一个新的垃圾袋。

phrases.en: She tucks the edges of the liner over the rim.
phrases.zh: 她把垃圾袋的边缘塞在桶沿上。

phrases.en: Finally, she washes her hands at the sink.
phrases.zh: 最后，她在水槽边洗了洗手。
